details: BuildInstaller.ps1 creates Installer\Default.isl from Installer\Languages\English.isl only while ISCC.exe is running
BuildInstaller.ps1 removes temporary Installer\Default.isl in the finally block
VerifyInstallerLocalization.ps1 fails if Installer\Default.isl remains after build
Installer\Languages\English.isl remains the only editable English installer language file
